name: Spicy Plum Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Cloves garlic, peeled and finely minced
1/2 tsp Asian chili paste with Garlic (see note)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pit the plums and coarsely chop them. Put into a food processor and puree.
2. In a heavy, medium-sized saucepan, heat the oil over medium heat. Add the garlic and ginger; saute for 2 minutes.
3. Stir in the plum puree, five-spice powder, lime juice, optional sherry, brown sugar, chili paste, and salt. Bring to a boil, reduce the heat and simmer for 25 minutes. Stir often.
4. Remove from the heat and let cool. Transfer to jars and refrigerate or freeze.
Note: Chili paste with garlic can be found in the Asian section of major supermarkets.
